meta.title: Five new cytotoxic T cell epitopes identified within Epstein-Barr virus nuclear antigen 3 -- Burrows et al. 75 (9): 2489 -- Journal of General Virology

abstractHtml: Epstein-Barr virus (EBV) CD8+ cytotoxic T lymphocyte (CTL) epitopes are currently being considered for inclusion into subunit vaccines. Here we describe the characterization of five new CTL epitopes within EBV nuclear antigen 3 (EBNA3), confirming EBNA3 as a major target for CTL recognition.
